args: set -eu; GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=$(cat /app/.deploy/github_mcp_token); export GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN; exec docker run -i --rm -e GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server
github.description: Official GitHub MCP server for repository, issues, pull requests, and workflow analysis

playwright.description: Official Playwright MCP server for browser automation and live web validation

x-search.description: xAI-backed X/Twitter search MCP server compatible with the OpenClaw x_search workflow
